arts.ttl: Portsmouth’s home clash with Millwall postponed after power cut
arts.sum: Fratton Park was plunged into darkness 11 minutes before the game was scheduled to kick-off.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Power cut at Fratton throws Portsmouth clash with Millwall into doubt
arts.sum: A power cut at Fratton Park has thrown Pompey’s clash with Millwall into doubt.

arts.ttl: Fresh Portsmouth injury hands Blues favourite with emotional return to John Mousinho's starting XI against Millwall
arts.sum: Colby Bishop has been handed his first Pompey start of the season for tonight’s visit of Millwall.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Millwall: build-up, team news and live commentary from Fratton Park
arts.sum: Good evening from Fratton Park for tonight’s clash under the lights with Millwall.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth V Millwall: Pompey fans warned to expect disruption with diversions for fans in place
arts.sum: Pompey fans are being warned to brace themselves for some disruption this evening with diversions in place for fans leaving Fratton Park as well as train issues.

arts.ttl: EFL make official decision ahead of Portsmouth vs Millwall Championship showdown
arts.sum: Portsmouth play host to Championship play-off hopefuls Millwall in a key fixture at Fratton Park

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Millwall: 5 outs and 4 doubts for important game at Fratton Park
arts.sum: Pompey welcome Millwall to Fratton Park tonight – 18 days since their last run-out.

arts.ttl: 'I want to help others': Award-winning documentary maker and Portsmouth fan makes career change
arts.sum: An award-winning documentary maker has retrained as a wellbeing coach in bid to help fellow mental health sufferers.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth title winner breaks silence as former Cardiff City and Oxford United man reveals reason for Fratton exit
arts.sum: Gavin Whyte has revealed a desire to reunite with his family prompted his Pompey exit.

arts.ttl: Former Millwall boss to join Frank Lampard’s backroom team at Coventry City
arts.sum: Coventry City boss-to-be Frank Lampard is set to bring Joe Edwards in as part of his backroom team,… The post Former Millwall boss to join Frank Lampard’s backroom team at Coventry City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
